text: There is a feeling of quiet anticipation in this dimly-lit, glass-bound space, with mysterious blue and purple glows hinting at a deeper activity. The light is cold, technological. I feel curiosity mixed with a slight unease—what experiments of thought, what research or innovation might be taking place here? The R+D on the wall reinforces the sense of exploration. It is invigorating to stand where knowledge is forged, yet humbling too, aware that so much is unknown.
